svg.title: Social and parenting control loop
svg.desc: Inputs from social context and body state flow through sensory, endocrine, limbic, and brainstem relays to preoptic and hypothalamic targets, which control body outputs and upward behavioral systems.
svg.text: Social and Parenting Regulation: A Hypothalamic Control Loop
Feedback: contact, infant state, milk transfer, stress buffering, and social context update the next prediction
early cues and internal state bias hypothalamic switching
before social or infant need becomes dangerous
